mapper.select: select id, task_id, event_status, dispatch_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_error, last_error_time, created_time, updated_time from question_outbox_event where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_time desc, id desc limit 1

select id, task_id, event_status, dispatch_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_error, last_error_time, created_time, updated_time from question_outbox_event where event_status = #{eventStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_time asc, id asc

select id, task_id, event_status, dispatch_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_error, last_error_time, created_time, updated_time from question_outbox_event where ( event_status in ('NEW', 'RETRYABLE') and (next_retry_time is null or next_retry_time <= now()) ) or ( event_status = 'SENDING' and updated_time is not null and updated_time <= date_sub(now(), interval #{sendingTimeoutSeconds,jdbcType=INTEGER} second) ) order by case when event_status = 'SENDING' then updated_time else ifnull(next_retry_time, created_time) end asc, created_time asc, id asc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.update: update question_outbox_event set event_status = 'SENDING', next_retry_time = null, updated_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ( ( event_status in ('NEW', 'RETRYABLE') and (next_retry_time is null or next_retry_time <= now()) ) or ( event_status = 'SENDING' and updated_time is not null and updated_time <= date_sub(now(), interval #{sendingTimeoutSeconds,jdbcType=INTEGER} second) ) )

update question_outbox_event set event_status = #{targetStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispatch_retry_count = #{dispatchRetryCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, next_retry_time = null, last_error = null, last_error_time = null, updated_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and event_status = #{expectedStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update question_outbox_event set event_status = #{targetStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispatch_retry_count = #{dispatchRetryCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_error = #{lastError,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, last_error_time = #{lastErrorTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and event_status = #{expectedStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
